snippet.title: 100 Tage Autark - Der Kinofilm | Offizieller Trailer 2026
snippet.description:
100 TAGE AUTARK – DER FILM
Ab 10. September 2026 im Kino.

100 Tage ohne Supermarkt, Stromnetz und moderne Versorgung: Johannes Mickenbecker (The Real Life Guys) wagt ein radikales Selbstversorger-Experiment.

Mitten in der Natur bauen sie sich ein eigenes Zuhause, erzeugen Strom, bauen Lebensmittel an und versuchen, vollständig von dem zu leben, was sie selbst erschaffen. Doch schon nach wenigen Tagen nimmt das Projekt eine unerwartete Wendung.

Aus einem großen Abenteuer wird für Johannes eine persönliche Grenzerfahrung. Ein Film über Freiheit, Gemeinschaft, Scheitern und die Frage, was wir wirklich zum Leben brauchen.

🎟️ Alle Infos zu Tickets und Kinos: www.100TageAutark.de
🎥 Dein Name im Abspann sichern: bit.ly/4gJcDgW
🎬 Kinostart: 10. September 2026

Teilt den Trailer mit euren Freunden und schreibt in die Kommentare: Würdet ihr 100 Tage autark leben?

#100TageAutark #RealLifeGuys #JohannesMickenbecker #Kinofilm #Dokumentarfilm #AutarkLeben #parablestudios

snippet.title: Alina Belle - Adios, My Love (Original Mix)
snippet.description:
Alina Belle Official YouTube Channel

Alina Belle is an emerging artist blending the smooth energy of Deep House, the nostalgic charm of Italo Disco, and modern electronic sounds into a unique musical experience.

Her music is all about mood, emotion, and rhythm — from deep, hypnotic beats to melodic, retro-inspired vibes. Each track creates its own atmosphere, perfect for late-night drives, dancefloor moments, or simply getting lost in the sound.

This channel is your space to discover fresh music and follow Alina Belle’s journey as she shapes her own sound.

Subscribe and feel the vibe. 🎶✨

#LetsGameItOut 

I Made My Absurdly Tall Factory Also Uncomfortably Wide - Satisfactory

----------

Check it out on Steam ► https://store.steampowered.com/app/526870/Satisfactory/

More about Satisfactory (from Steam):

Satisfactory is a first-person open-world factory building game with a dash of exploration and combat. Play alone or with friends, explore an alien planet, create multi-story factories, and enter conveyor belt heaven!

Construct
Conquer nature by building massive factories across the land. Expand wherever and however you want. The planet is filled with valuable natural resources just waiting to be utilized. As an employee of FICSIT it’s your duty to make sure they come to good use.

Automate
Construct your factories with gracious perfection or build intricate webs of conveyor belts to supply all your needs. Automate trucks and trains to reach your faraway outposts and be sure to handle liquids properly by transporting them in pipes. It’s all about minimizing manual labour!

Explore & Exploit
Venture on expeditions to search for new materials and be sure to put everything to good use. Nature is yours to harvest! You have vehicles, jetpacks, jump pads and more at your disposal to make the exploration easier. Equip the proper safety gear as well, just in case you run into the local wildlife.

FEATURES
• Open World: Explore the huge (30km2) alien planet that is Massage-2(AB)b with its unique fauna and creatures.
• Co-Op: Build a factory yourself or share the joy with your friends. Up to you!
• Factory Building: Experience building a huge factory from a first-person perspective. Automate and optimize it to perfection for your personal satisfaction.
• Customization: Customize your factory to your own liking. Build at high altitudes or over wide plains, there is almost no limits in the making of your tailor-made factory.
• Vehicles: Travel the world with class. Use jump pads, factory carts, jetpacks, hypertubes, trucks or trains. The choice is yours!

Ich hab‘ dich gehört, bevor ich dich das allererste Mal geseh’n hab

Seit wann fällt bei dir täglich dieser Regen?

Ich will nicht, dass du weißt, wie es ist, wenn du weg bist

snippet.title: Alphaville - Forever Young (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
» Stream Alphaville - Forever Young (Lyrics): 
🎵 listen to the best tiktok playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL8q1rV0m6tZqliEiqDrZCGkhAWRmmvjBw

» Support Alphaville:
https://www.instagram.com/alphaville.music

» Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Let's dance in style, let's dance for a while
Heaven can wait, we're only watching the skies
Hoping for the best but expecting the worst
Are you gonna drop the bomb or not?
Let us die young or let us live forever
We don't have the power but we never say never
Sitting in a sandpit, life is a short trip
The music's for the sad man

[Pre-Chorus]
Can you imagine when this race is won?
Turn our golden faces into the sun
Praising our leaders, we're getting in tune
The music's played by the, the mad man

[Chorus]
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever young

[Verse 2]
Some are like water, some are like the heat
Some are a melody and some are the beat
Sooner or later, they all will be gone
Why don't they stay young?
It's so hard to get old without a cause
I don't want to perish like a fading horse
Youth's like diamonds in the sun
And diamonds are forever

[Pre-Chorus]
So many adventures couldn't happen today
So many songs we forgot to play
So many dreams swinging out of the blue
We'll let them come true

[Chorus]
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever

[Outro]
Forever young, I wanna be forever young
Do you really want to live forever? (Forever)

💖Comment "i love u" if you're reading this

#Alphaville #ForeverYoung #SyrebralVibes

Alan Walker x Ava Max Style, Aeon KnoX - Missing You (Official Music Video)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
"Missing You" is an emotional melodic EDM anthem from Aeon KnoX, blending cinematic atmospheres, heartfelt female vocals, and powerful festival-inspired drops into a journey through love, distance, hope, and unforgettable memories.

With soaring supersaws, emotional melodies, and an immersive night-time atmosphere, this track captures the feeling of searching for someone who still lives in your heart, even across endless skies.

snippet.title: Geceye Sözüm Var – Akustik Arabesk Pop | Anatolia Sound
snippet.description:
🎧 Geceye Sözüm Var – Akustik Arabesk Pop | Anatolia Sound

“Geceye Sözüm Var” bu kez daha sade, daha içten ve daha akustik bir yorumla sizlerle…

Nylon gitar arpejleri, fretless bass geçişleri, duygusal yaylılar ve naif kadın vokalin birleştiği bu akustik arabesk pop versiyon; yalnızlık, kırgınlık ve yeniden ayağa kalkma hissini samimi bir stüdyo atmosferinde anlatıyor.

Kalabalıkların içinde kendi sesini arayanlara…
Kırıldığı yerden yeniden başlayanlara…
Geceye rağmen içindeki ışığı kaybetmeyenlere…

🎶 Keyifli dinlemeler.
Beğenmeyi, yorum yapmayı ve kanala abone olarak destek olmayı unutmayın. Her yorum ve paylaşım bizim için çok değerli. 🤍

🎙️ Söz & Müzik : Hasip Ağırçelik
🎼 Tarz: Akustik Arabesk Pop / Modern Arabesk / Turkish Slow Pop
🏷️ Kanal: Anatolia Sound

📜 Şarkı Sözleri:

Şehir uyurken yürürüm tek başıma
Işıklar dökülür sessiz kaldırımlara
Bir ses ararım kalabalık içinde
Kendi adımı duyarım en derinde

Bir iz sürerim eski benliğimden
Kırık yanımı saklarım gecemden
Yoruldum susmaktan, sustukça büyür
İçimdeki fırtına, içimde gürler

Geceye sözüm var, dağılmam artık
Karanlık üstüme yıkılmaz artık
Düşsem de kalkarım, bırakmam kendimi
Yollar uzun olsa da bulurum yerimi

Geceye sözüm var, susmam bu defa
Kırıklar içimde kalmaz sabaha
Bir ışık yakarım en dipte bile
Kendime varırım, adım adım yine

Yağmur iner, konuşur camlarda
Her damla anlatır başka bir yara
Silerim yüzümü, başlarım yeniden
Kaybolsam bile dönerim kendimden

Bir nefes alırım, içime dolar
Küçük bir umut bile yolu açar
Yavaşça değişir sesimin tonu
Korkumdan güçlüdür kalbimin yolu

Gece geçer, ben kalırım
Adım adım… ben olurum
